results.rendered_html:
vi-√kṣubh Ā. -kṣobhate &c. (Ved. inf. vi-kṣobdhos,  ŚBr. ), to be shaken about or agitated or disturbed,  AV. ;  BhP. ;
to confuse, disturb,  ŚBr.  :
Caus. -kṣobhayati, to agitate, disturb, throw into disorder or confusion,  MBh. ;  R. ;  Suśr.
